scripts.test:nest:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env run --rm backend-nest sh -lc "npm install --include=dev && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema /app/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run test:integration"
scripts.test:nest:ws: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env run --rm backend-nest sh -lc "npm install --include=dev && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema /app/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run test:ws"
scripts.test:nest:gate: npm run test:nest:build && npm run test:nest:smoke && npm run test:nest:unit && npm run test:nest:service && npm run test:nest:integration && npm run test:nest:ws
